description_long: This is a compact wooden cabinet with a rectangular top surface, two small drawers at the upper front, and two open shelves below. The cabinet is constructed from a medium-brown wood with a visible grain pattern, giving it a warm and natural appearance. The drawers feature round wooden knobs, blending seamlessly with the overall design. The sides and back are solid panels, while the front is open to provide access to the shelves and drawers. The structure is sturdy, with slightly tapered legs that extend from the top to the floor. This piece is suitable for use in entryways, living rooms, or urban garages for storage and organization.
description: A medium-brown wooden cabinet with two drawers and two open shelves, featuring round wooden knobs and a sturdy, natural finish. Its compact design and solid construction make it ideal for storage in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with round knobs and two open shelves beneath.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wooden panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back panel and the open shelves from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid wooden panel.
